scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,user,room,character -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w gateway" "npm run dev -w user-service" "npm run dev -w room-service" "npm run dev -w character-service"
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,user,room,character -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start -w gateway" "npm run start -w user-service" "npm run start -w room-service" "npm run start -w character-service"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w gateway && npm run typecheck -w user-service && npm run typecheck -w room-service && npm run typecheck -w character-service
scripts.sam:invoke:user:health: sam local invoke UserServiceFunction --template-file sam/template.yaml --parameter-overrides UserMongoUri="mongodb://host.docker.internal:27021/munch_user_service" -e sam/events/user-get-health.json
scripts.sam:invoke:user:create: sam local invoke UserServiceFunction --template-file sam/template.yaml --parameter-overrides UserMongoUri="mongodb://host.docker.internal:27021/munch_user_service" -e sam/events/user-post-users.json
scripts.sam:invoke:user:update: sam local invoke UserServiceFunction --template-file sam/template.yaml --parameter-overrides UserMongoUri="mongodb://host.docker.internal:27021/munch_user_service" -e sam/events/user-patch-user.json
